description: Create an inlet with the specified ID. An inlet uses data stored in a brick to generate bodies (balls, clumps, or rblocks) during cycling.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('brick inlet create ...') via command interface

keywords.name: active
keywords.description: Set the inlet activity status. The default is false .

keywords.name: brick-id
keywords.description: Set the brick.

keywords.name: flow-velocity
keywords.description: Set the flow velocity.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: The group slot slot is set to s for the newly created bodies. If slot is not specified, then the group slot Default is set to s .

keywords.name: orientation
keywords.description: Set the inlet orientation from Euler angles following the X,Y,Z convention (e.g., rotation about the \(x\) -axis followed by rotation about the \(y’\) -axis followed by rotation about the \(z’\) -axis) in degrees.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Set the inlet position. The position corresponds to the position of the centroid of the brick extent.

keywords.name: relaxation-steps
keywords.description: Activate inlet relaxation scheme based on the number of steps. A force equal and opposite to the out-of-balance force is applied to the bodies inserted up to i1 steps. If i2 is specified, then the applied force is multiplied by a factor linearly decaying from 1 to 0 between steps i1 and i2 .

keywords.name: relaxation-time
keywords.description: Activate inlet relaxation scheme based on the mechanical time. A force equal and opposite to the out-of-balance force is applied to the bodies inserted up to an elapsed mechanical time of f1 steps. If f2 is specified, then the applied force is multiplied by a factor linearly decaying from 1 to 0 between times f1 and f2 .

keywords.name: rotation-center
keywords.description: Set the inlet rotation center.

keywords.name: spin
keywords.description: Set the inlet angular velocity. Rotation occurs with respect to the rotation center.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Set the inlet translational velocity. If not null, the center of rotation is also translated during motion.
